title: SkyRealms+
description: Cool additions to Minecraft whit Skyrealms+ Go give it a try!
body:
![What is this?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fec32c2d5ba3db82bf447e12c3b230d692aaec9_0.webp)

**SkyRealms+** is a **Forge mod** (currently for **1.20.1**) that brings a whole new layer of progression and mystery. There’s already a lot to explore!

### Features:
**Sky Apple** – a food builded whit sky good power

**Sky Forest** – a new dimension full of new surprises _(Sky oak, Sky water)_

**Sky Sword** – a weapon infused with sky God energy

**Sky Stone** – a block found only in **Sky forest biomes**

**…and lots more sky-themed items and blocks to discover!**


## Technical
Mod stage: **Beta 1.0.0 (Will not be updated)**

Loader: **Forge 1.20.1**

![End banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33ca1cdb0c9305bc46279c84e2f78139e8c02e86_0.webp)
